text: L) Anonymous (ID: @ERTEL) [+1 02/01/24(Thu)22:22:52 N0.457287338 P> >>457288108 >>457288223 >>457289854 >>457286923 Sexual attraction thrives off mystery and tension. The more that sex and sexuality are openly displayed, demystified and normalized in a society, the less exciting it is. The great irony is that the more a society embraces open sexuality, the less sex that society will actually have. The sex that it does have becomes performative (tv, movies, porn) and the sexuality displayed is likewise performative (social media thots and gym chads), rather than either being productive (men and women forming families and producing children). We are forcibly going to heal this damaged world. DAILY WIRE
